proofs.title: MVCC SSI 冲突检测正确性
proofs.tool_details: TLC 2026.04.29, 13 states, 6 distinct states, depth 4, 5 invariants all PASS

proofs.title: UPDATE/DELETE 语义完整性
proofs.tool_details: Formulog 0.8.0, Docker isolated runner with Z3 SMT solver

proofs.title: NULL Three-Valued Logic (3VL) Semantics
proofs.tool_details: Formulog 0.8.0, negation-free stratification, type workaround for bv32/Int mismatch

proofs.title: HAVING Clause Semantics (Post-Aggregation Filtering)
key_properties: HAVING evaluated after GROUP BY aggregation
Groups not satisfying HAVING condition are eliminated
NULL handling follows 3VL: UNKNOWN comparisons yield NOT TRUE

proofs.title: CTE Non-Recursive Semantics
key_properties: CTEs are named temporary result sets scoped to single query
Evaluation order: CTEs resolved in declaration order (top-down)
CTEs shadow outer tables with the same name
CTE chains: later CTE can reference earlier CTE

s0_s05_reverification.summary: Formulog proofs type-check verified. TLA+/Dafny specs are embedded markdown documentation (not executable). Evidence via cargo test.
s0_s05_reverification.tla_plus_note: TLA+ specs embedded in markdown as documentation, not standalone .tla files. TLC model-checking evidence from 2026.04.29.
s0_s05_reverification.dafny_note: Dafny specs (PROOF-002,004,009,011,013) are markdown documentation. No executable .dfy for direct verification.
s0_s05_reverification.cargo_tests: All S0-S05 categories have corresponding cargo test coverage in crates/executor, crates/parser, crates/storage, crates/transaction
